Hero.headline: Precision Engineered. Globally Delivered.
Hero.subheadline: Advanced industrial components and custom manufacturing solutions for the world's most demanding machinery.

ProductDetail.related_sub: Explore other engineered solutions in the same category.
ProductDetail.cta_text: We engineer and manufacture made-to-order parts for specific industrial requirements. Our team is ready to quote against your technical drawing.

RFQModal.title: Request for Quote
RFQModal.notesPlaceholder: Please specify any custom dimensions, hardness requirements, or machine details...
RFQModal.successMessage: Thank you for your inquiry. Our engineering team will review your requirements and send a formal quote within 24 hours.

WhatsAppChat.title: WhatsApp Live Support
WhatsAppChat.subtitle: Your message is delivered straight to our line
WhatsAppChat.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your need: dimensions, quantity, hardness, lead time, etc.
WhatsAppChat.openedText: WhatsApp Web/app has opened in a new tab. Just review your message and tap Send.
WhatsAppChat.disclaimer: When you click Send, WhatsApp Web or the mobile app opens in a new tab with your message pre-filled. All you need to do is press Send.

CustomManufacturing.heroText: From technical drawing to final product. We transform raw materials into high-precision industrial components.
CustomManufacturing.processDesc: Our standardized workflow ensures quality and precision at every stage.
CustomManufacturing.step1Desc: Review of CAD/DWG files and material selection.
CustomManufacturing.step2Desc: In-house CNC machining of precision molds.
CustomManufacturing.capabilitiesDesc: Advanced manufacturing technologies for diverse industrial needs.
CustomManufacturing.cap1Desc: Custom hardness (60-95 Shore A) and color options.
CustomManufacturing.cap2Desc: Precision milling of aluminum and engineering plastics.
CustomManufacturing.cap3Desc: Compression and injection molding for NR, NBR, EPDM.
CustomManufacturing.cap4Desc: High-strength chemical bonding of rubber/PU to metal.
CustomManufacturing.formDesc: Send us your requirements and technical drawings for a detailed engineering quote.

CustomRFQ.notesPlaceholder: Describe application, working conditions (temp, load, chemical), and special tolerances...
CustomRFQ.successMessage: Your project files have been securely received. Our engineering team will analyze the drawings and contact you shortly.

Home.materialsSubtitle: High-performance polymers and metals for extreme durability.
Home.materialsDescription: High-performance polymer and metal components engineered for demanding industrial environments.

why.title:
Engineered for
Performance
why.description: We combine decades of material science expertise with advanced manufacturing capabilities to deliver components that last longer and perform better.

cards.materialsDesc: We use only high-grade raw materials from trusted global suppliers like Covestro and Lanxess.
cards.engineeringDesc: From prototype to mass production, our engineering team designs molds and parts to your exact specifications.
cards.logisticsDesc: Fast and reliable shipping to 50+ countries with full export documentation and real-time tracking.
cards.speedDesc: Streamlined production processes ensure on-time delivery even for complex custom orders.

cta.title:
Ready to optimize
your machinery?
cta.description: Get a competitive quote for your custom parts or standard components today. Our engineers respond within 48 hours.

polyurethane.desc: Custom hardness casting for high abrasion resistance.

metadata.title: About KARPOL | 15 Years of Engineering Excellence
metadata.description: Learn how KARPOL engineers high-performance polyurethane, rubber, and engineering plastic components from Denizli, Turkey for global industrial machinery.

hero.title: 15 Years of Engineering Excellence
hero.subtitle: From our high-tech facility in Denizli to the world's most demanding industries, we engineer components that don't fail.

story.title: Built for Industrial Reliability
story.p1: KARPOL operates a modern production facility in Denizli Merkezefendi, Zorlu Sanayi Sitesi—where disciplined industrial standards meet advanced CNC machining and polymer casting technologies.
story.p2: We manufacture polyurethane, rubber, and engineering plastic solutions for critical applications across marble processing, mining, and automation—delivering consistent performance, repeatability, and long service life.
story.facilityValue: Modern plant designed for repeatable, high-tolerance manufacturing
story.techValue: CNC machining, polymer casting, and engineered bonding processes
story.qualityValue: Process discipline, incoming control, and final inspection at every stage
story.addressValue: Zorlu Sanayi Sitesi, Bozburun Mahallesi, Merkezefendi / Denizli, Turkey

values.title: B2B Values That Reduce Risk
values.lead: We earn trust by engineering predictability: materials, tolerances, lead times, and documentation aligned with industrial procurement standards.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.text: Stable raw materials, controlled processes, and traceable outputs for repeatable performance.

material.title: Material Science Expertise
material.text: Polyurethane, rubber, and engineering plastics engineered for abrasion, load, and chemical resistance.

prototype.title: Rapid Prototyping & Custom Mfg
prototype.text: Fast iteration from technical drawing to tested part—built for your machine and your conditions.

delivery.title: Reliable Delivery & Support
delivery.text: Export-ready packaging, clear communication, and B2B documentation for smooth procurement.

cta.title: Let’s Engineer Your Next Component
cta.text: Share your drawing, application details, and target performance. Our team will recommend the right material and production method.

HomeHero.subtitle: High-performance spare parts, polyurethane components, slab factory tools, and heavy-duty transport solutions — built for the demands of the marble industry.

ContactPage.heroSubtitle: Whether you need spare parts, polyurethane components, slab factory tools, or heavy-duty stone transport solutions — our team is ready to support your operation.
ContactPage.intro: Share drawings, quantities, or technical questions. We respond with clear engineering and commercial follow-up.
ContactPage.successBody: We will get back to you as soon as possible.
ContactPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

metadata.title: Industrial Components & Spare Parts
metadata.description: Browse KARPOL's engineering catalog: polyurethane, Vulkollan, rubber, silicone, technical plastics and CNC-machined components for demanding industrial machinery.

hero.subtitle: Eleven curated material families — from Vulkollan® rollers to precision chrome shafts — engineered for the world's most demanding production floors.

categories.title: Browse by material family
categories.subtitle: Every component in our library is engineered in-house and field-proven across marble, automotive, logistics and heavy industry.

card.productsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no products yet} one {# product} other {# products}}

cta.title: Didn't find the exact part?
cta.text: Send us your technical drawing or sample. Our engineers will recommend the right material and production method — from one-off prototypes to full production runs.

categoryDescriptions.polyurethane-components: High-load bearing rollers, wheels and linings with exceptional abrasion resistance.
categoryDescriptions.vulkollan-components: Original licensed Bayer Vulkollan® elastomers for extreme dynamic loads and durability.
categoryDescriptions.rubber-components: Precision-molded O-rings, gaskets, bellows and vibration dampeners in NBR, EPDM and NR.
categoryDescriptions.silicone-components: High-temperature seals, rollers and tubing resistant to oil, steam and UV.
categoryDescriptions.technical-plastics: Machined gears, bushings and wear plates from POM, PA6, PE1000 and PTFE.
categoryDescriptions.aluminum-machined-parts: CNC-milled and turned aluminum housings, brackets and structural components.
categoryDescriptions.chrome-plated-components: Hard-chrome plated shafts and rollers for corrosion resistance and surface hardness.
categoryDescriptions.custom-engineered-parts: Bespoke manufacturing from technical drawings. Mold design and prototyping.
categoryDescriptions.vacuum-handling-components: Suction cups, vacuum pads and seals for stone, glass and composite handling systems.
categoryDescriptions.conveyor-transport-parts: Drive pulleys, idlers and conveyor elements for heavy-duty material transport.
categoryDescriptions.marble-machine-spare-parts: Direct replacement parts for Simec, Breton, Gaspari and other major stone machinery.
